prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to an application made by Affinity Water Limited, which operates primarily in England, specifically in the regions of Hertfordshire and Middlesex. The Environment Agency, responsible for overseeing water resources in England, is involved in the application process, indicating its relevance to England.
